decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id corridor_nostrand-avenue is already the correct canonical record. The source 201109_brt_nostrand_cac4 is registered under that record, and corridor_nostrand-ave-rogers-ave-cac4-201109 is already a registered alias. The observation describes the same Nostrand Avenue/Rogers Avenue corridor from Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay (9.3 miles, B44 route). Per rules, when the closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id, the decision is 'new' (observation already resolves to that id).

evidence_refs.source_quote: Nostrand Ave/Rogers Ave Corridor - 9.3 miles from Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay
